evidence: ARIAService.checkAndCompact was using a main-queue ModelContext from a non-main async path, which matched the runtime 'ModelContext: Unbinding from the main queue' warning.
ARIAChatView used immediate onChange-driven auto-scroll updates during token streaming, which matched the repeated 'onChange(of: String) action tried to update multiple times per frame' warning.
The remaining WebKit and entitlement logs originate from embedded WKWebView / macOS subsystems and were not reproduced as build-breaking issues.

tests.cmd: '/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/usr/bin/xcodebuild' -project IBVault.xcodeproj -scheme IBVault -configuration Debug -sdk macosx -derivedDataPath /tmp/IBVault-chat-runtime-fix CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

notes: scripts/validate_rpg.py is referenced by AGENTS.md but is not present in this repository, so RPG validation could not be run.
